description: Style Note denizen has captured a fun, casual look in their range of T-shirts. Well fitted, comfortable and not lacking in colour, you can pair this tee with jeans to look charmingly attractive. Each one comes with a uniquely themed print on the front which sets these t-shirts ahead of the pack. Casual and fun, you'll want these to be part of your casual wardrobe! Product Details Red T-shirt, has a funky Thursday print in front, round ribbed neckline, short sleeves and branding above the hemline Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash cold Tumble dry low Use warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
